cold_start_ms.notes: App launch to Phase 9 ready marker.

rss_mb.notes: Resident set size sampled from ps after startup settle.

idle_cpu_percent.notes: Average of five ps CPU samples during a quiet window.

input_latency_ms.notes: Fixture smoke result; measured latency is pending until Plan 09-03.

heavy_output.notes: Fixture smoke result; measured heavy-output stress is pending until Plan 09-03.

frame_pacing.notes: Fixture smoke result; xctrace/frame-pacing summary is pending until Plan 09-03.

misses.mitigation: Profile resident memory and reduce baseline allocations or document release exception.
Profile idle run loop, metrics sampler, and render lifecycle.
Validate terminal-bound fixture availability and measure controller-to-PTY latency.
Validate terminal-bound heavy-output fixture and inspect UI/output batching.
Validate render-pulse fixture and capture frame-pacing summary.
